<!-- hive-mind:working-session-summary -->
## Working session summary

Implemented, committed, pushed, and marked PR 109 ready:

https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/pull/109

Commit: `31c25c7 feat: improve mobile composer UI`

What changed:
- Mobile topbar now uses a left menu button and hides the logo/wordmark.
- Drawer now shows logo, title, version, and sidebar controls.
- Desktop header shows version next to the brand.
- Composer is now a compact mobile row with action/menu, input, and send.
- Added configurable input style and action settings.
- Added case-study evidence and screenshots under `docs/case-studies/issue-108/`.
- Updated PR description with screenshots and verification.

Verification:
- Local checks passed: JS syntax, full Playwright e2e `86 passed`, Rust fmt, Clippy, Rust tests `266 passed`, doc tests, file-size check.
- GitHub Actions passed for commit `31c25c7`: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/actions/runs/26024893152
- Working tree is clean and branch is synced with `origin/issue-108-e4fa776bf7e7`.

Research sources captured in the case study include MDN viewport units, `env()`, `backdrop-filter`, and web.dev viewport units.

---
